name: mdlink-check
description: Check markdown files for broken links — local file targets and HTTP(S) URLs, single file or whole directory

scripts.test: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/parser.js && node --check src/file-checker.js && node --check src/url-checker.js && node src/index.js README.md

author: Steve Harlow (https://github.com/sgharlow)
